creator: iwasaki@pc.jaring.my
text:
Why do we need to have two `cvs-crypto' descriptions in cvsup.sgml? It seems that they are exactly the same. cvs-crypto release=cvs The export-restricted cryptography code.

cvs-crypto release=cvs The export-restricted cryptography code.

How-To-Repeat: vi +478 /usr/src/share/doc/handbook/cvsup.sgml
